---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
<!-- Clear description of the feature request -->

## Motivation
<!-- Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How should this be implemented? -->

## Implementation Details (Optional)
<!-- Any technical suggestions or implementation approaches -->

## Alternative Solutions (Optional)
<!-- Other possible ways to solve this -->

## Priority
- [ ] Low (nice to have)
- [ ] Medium (would be helpful)
- [ ] High (important improvement)

## Additional Context
<!-- Any other relevant information -->

---

**Before submitting:**
- [ ] I've checked if a similar feature request already exists
- [ ] This feature doesn't conflict with the module's primary purpose
